jobDistinction.legacyPausedAuditJob: Broad website issue discovery plus small automatic fixes/upgrades; currently paused.
jobDistinction.currentRemediationJob: Backlog-driven remediation, optimization, and upgrade loop based on .hermes/remediation-backlog.md.

nonOverlapPolicy: If the previous remediation run is still active, skip the current tick instead of starting another fix run.

freshAuditPolicy.action: Run comprehensive audit, update remediation-backlog.md with newly discovered or reprioritized issues, then continue remediation.
freshAuditPolicy.completionAuditDetail: When the current checklist is completed, run a broad detailed audit like the 2026-05-30 manual review: backend/API, frontend/UI, permissions, production behavior, performance/data scale, tests, deployment, logs, navigation, accessibility, and real user journeys; update remediation-backlog.md before continuing.

lastHealthyBaseline.tests: Storage access plus Files page/API/client regressions passed: 26 tests
lastHealthyBaseline.production: vcontrolhub-next and vcontrolhub-ssh-ws restarted active; /api/status healthy; /files 307; /api/files/list 401; /api/storage/sftp 401; recent service logs clean

lastRun.target: P1 storage/file permission UI capabilities from fresh-audit findings
lastRun.summary: Files page initial payload and /api/files/list SPA refreshes now serialize per-entry storage read/write/delete capabilities from explicit UserStorageAccess grants; the file browser hides preview/download, rename/move/edit, delete, and batch selection controls when the current entry capability does not allow the action.
validation: continued existing dirty storage/file permission capability batch instead of starting a new topic
npm run lint passed with existing react-hooks/set-state-in-effect warnings
production services vcontrolhub-next.service and vcontrolhub-ssh-ws.service restarted and active
recent production logs checked; no new error/warn entries
lastRun.deployment: Restarted vcontrolhub-next.service and vcontrolhub-ssh-ws.service successfully; smoke test passed. Commit/push is the remaining closeout step for this run.
lastRun.nextTarget: Commit/push this verified batch, then continue remaining fresh-audit P1 storage sync/taskification or P2 destructive modal/accessibility polish.

runPolicy.batchSize: coherent deployable batch; may be larger for high-value architecture/performance/availability/user-experience improvements if fully verified
